# Yasin Engin

Yasin Engin — Network Automation & Future Networks Engineer Candidate

I build reproducible network labs, SDN automation workflows, NDN simulations, and Go-based backend tools.

Computer Engineering student focused on Network Automation, Software-Defined Networking, Named Data Networking, Go backend systems, distributed systems, and future network architectures.

- Portfolio: https://yasinenginn.github.io/

- Network Automation

## Canonical URL Policy

Directory-style project and collection URLs are canonical. Legacy URLs such as /projects.html, /videos.html, /library.html, and /projects/tolerex.html redirect to their canonical pages while preserving matching social preview metadata.
